title: Speculation engine Phase 2+: OverlaySpeculationEngine, prediction heuristic, acceptance workflow (#166 continuation)
description:
Phase 1 of the speculation engine (#166) landed the trait surface (SpeculationEngine), NoOpSpeculationEngine, build_hint_from_messages, after_turn integration hook, and 23 tests in src/speculation/mod.rs.

Remaining work (Phase 2+):

Phase 2 — OverlaySpeculationEngine
- In-memory filesystem snapshot (overlay) of relevant paths, populated before the model turn starts
- Speculative tool calls (read_file, list_files, bash with read-only commands) write results into the overlay
- Prediction heuristic: pattern-match SpeculationHint::recent_messages to predict the next tool call (e.g., after a write_file, predict read_file on the same path)
- Requires an overlay-filesystem subsystem (in-memory path-to-content map, copy-on-write semantics)
- Wire build_engine in SpeculationConfig::enabled = true path to return OverlaySpeculationEngine

Phase 3 — Acceptance workflow
- When the model's actual tool call matches the prediction (Hit): promote the overlay result without re-running the tool
- When it does not match (Miss/PartialMiss): discard the overlay silently, run the tool normally
- Pipeline integration: pipeline::run_turn should call after_turn with actual tool names so the engine records hit/miss metrics
- Expose hit-rate metric in TUI status bar

Integration point: src/speculation/mod.rs — all public types and the SpeculationEngine trait are already defined. The factory build_engine has a cfg.enabled branch that logs a warning and falls back to no-op; replace that branch with the real OverlaySpeculationEngine.

Constraint: No unimplemented!() or stubs. Every line shipped must do real work.
